mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medical_team_duty (dept_id, duty_date, staff_name, staff_role, duty_time, phone) VALUES (#{deptId}, #{dutyDate}, #{staffName}, #{staffRole}, #{dutyTime}, #{phone})
mapper.update: UPDATE medical_team_duty SET dept_id = #{deptId}, duty_date = #{dutyDate}, staff_name = #{staffName}, staff_role = #{staffRole}, duty_time = #{dutyTime}, phone = #{phone} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, dept_id, duty_date, staff_name, staff_role, duty_time, phone, created_at FROM medical_team_duty ORDER BY duty_date DESC, id
